seoTitle: How to Keep Your Slack Status Active All the Time
metaDescription: Learn why Slack shows you as away after inactivity and how to manually force your status to stay active using built-in settings.
intro: Slack automatically switches your presence to 'Away' after a few minutes without mouse or keyboard activity, which can be frustrating if you're reading, on a call, or just stepping away from your desk briefly. This guide explains how Slack's presence detection works and how to manually override it so your green dot stays active, along with a few system-level tips for preventing your computer from sleeping mid-task.

steps.heading: Understand how Slack detects activity
steps.body: Slack's presence engine watches for mouse movement and window focus, automatically switching your status to away after a period of inactivity.

steps.heading: Open your profile status menu
steps.body: Click your profile name header to open the status selection drawer where presence options live.

steps.heading: Select 'Set Yourself as Active'
steps.body: Choose this option to manually override the automatic inactivity timer and keep your green dot showing regardless of mouse movement.

steps.heading: Check your notification and focus preferences
steps.body: Review your global preferences to see notification delivery settings and any tracking checkboxes that affect how presence is calculated.

steps.heading: Adjust your computer's sleep settings
steps.body: Update your Mac or Windows power preferences to delay sleep mode, since your system going idle can still affect how Slack reads your activity.

faq.question: Why does Slack keep showing me as away even though I'm working?
faq.answer: This usually happens because your mouse and keyboard have been idle for a few minutes, which triggers Slack's automatic away detection.

faq.question: Does setting myself as active drain my battery faster?
faq.answer: Forcing an active status doesn't directly affect battery life, though preventing your computer from sleeping to maintain it might use more power over time.

faq.question: Will 'Set Yourself as Active' turn off automatically?
faq.answer: It can revert back to automatic detection depending on how you configure it, so check your status settings periodically if you want it to stay forced active.

faq.question: Is there a way to tell my team I'm active but not available to chat?
faq.answer: Yes, pair an active status with a custom status message and emoji, like 'Focusing', to signal you're online but not immediately reachable.
